overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic waterfront promenade from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along a sunny waterfront path beside a distinctive teal and orange building, then enters a covered pedestrian arcade with neon signs and concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic waterfront promenade with seating and viewing areas

events.description: camera pans from open water view to reveal the waterfront promenade and futuristic building
camera slows slightly while navigating past seated pedestrians on benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing by seated pedestrians and observing the water

notable_agents.action: person leaning on metal railing looking out at the water
group of pedestrians walking along the building facade

entered.detail: multi-story building with distinctive teal and orange paneling and large glass windows
silver metal railing running along the waterfront edge
black metal benches facing the water for pedestrian seating
telescope viewer mounted on the railing for observing the distant skyline
tall palm trees planted near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of open water and a distant pier, then transitions to a sunny waterfront promenade. A futuristic building with teal and orange architecture dominates the left side, while benches and coin-operated viewers line the right edge overlooking the water. Sparse pedestrians sit on benches or walk along the path as the camera moves forward in bright midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade underneath building with neon storefronts

events.description: entering the covered walkway underneath the building, dramatic shift from bright sunlight to shadowed interior
approaching concrete ramp leading upward at the end of the covered arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered pedestrian arcade, passing various pedestrians and observing neon storefronts on the left

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket walking ahead into the deeper section of the arcade
pedestrian with distinctive hairstyle and white shirt walking toward the camera

entered.detail: underside of the building forming a covered walkway with curved concrete ceiling
pink and yellow illuminated signage on the left wall advertising shops
massive industrial orange piping visible through openings to the waterfront
upward sloping concrete ramp with metal railings at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian arcade beneath the building, transitioning from bright sunlight to shadowed mixed lighting. The space features curved concrete architecture, neon signs on the left wall, and views of large orange industrial pipes through openings to the water. Moderate pedestrian traffic moves in opposing directions as the camera progresses toward a concrete ramp at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open waterfront promenade into the shadowed depths of a futuristic pedestrian arcade. It begins by gliding past open water and a distant pier, moving along a sunny path where a teal and orange building looms to the left and coin-operated viewers line the water's edge. As the camera progresses forward through the midday sunlight, the scene shifts as it enters the covered arcade beneath the building's structure. The environment then transitions from bright exposure to mixed lighting, moving past curved concrete walls and glowing neon signs while glimpses of large orange industrial pipes appear through openings to the exterior. The movement finally carries the camera through a flow of pedestrians toward a concrete ramp at the far end of the corridor.
